welcome.title: Welcome to Opus Populi
welcome.subtitle: Your civic engagement hub — track propositions, representatives, campaign finance, and petitions all in one place

explore.title: Explore Your Region
explore.description: Stay informed with comprehensive civic data for your area

scan.title: Scan Petitions
scan.description: Use your camera to scan petitions for instant AI-powered verification and tracking
scan.permissionNote: We'll ask for camera access when you're ready to scan. No images are saved to your device.

analyze.title: Instant Analysis
analyze.description: AI analyzes petitions, propositions, and campaign data to help you make informed decisions

track.title: Track Progress
track.description: Follow ballot measures, petition activity, and legislative sessions in your area

address.title: Where do you live?
address.subtitle: We use your address to find your local elections, propositions, and representatives. Skippable.

errors.allRequired: Please fill in all four fields, or skip this step.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your address. You can try again or skip for now.

topics.title: What matters to you?
topics.subtitle: Pick your top 3. Focus beats breadth — these are the issues you can meaningfully influence.
topics.reasonBody: Civic attention is finite. Three issues you can actually write your reps about, show up for, or organize around beats a wishlist of twelve you'll only doom-scroll. You can broaden this later in settings.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your topics. You can try again or skip.

lifeContext.title: A bit about your day
lifeContext.subtitle: These help us surface bills that touch your life. Every chip is optional.

family.caregiver: Caring for an aging family member

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your selections. You can try again or skip.

veteran.title: One sensitive question
veteran.subtitle: This is the only sensitive field we ask about in onboarding. You can always skip.
veteran.lockedNote: Already set from a previous visit. To remove it, manage your privacy in settings.
veteran.noFieldsToggle: Never store sensitive fields about me

disclosure.whyWeAsk: Veteran status helps us surface bills on healthcare, benefits, and housing protections that affect you. Stored encrypted; never shared with the recommendation engine in raw form — only a boolean flag.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your answer. You can try again or skip.
